goal: Flat inventory of every camera prim with path, type, resolution, fps; flag suspicious ones.
thoughts: list_cameras is the one tool here. Follow up with inspect_camera only on prims with obviously wrong settings (0x0 resolution, missing parent xform). Do NOT list lidars/IMUs — cameras only. Group output by parent prim so duplicates jump out.
code:
cams = list_cameras()

# Table: prim_path | type (RGB/depth/stereo) | resolution | fps | parent | flags
for c in cams:
    if c.resolution == (0, 0) or c.fps == 0 or not c.parent_xform:
        inspect_camera(prim_path=c.prim_path)     # drill into suspicious ones

# Group by parent prim to expose duplicates on the same robot.
# Do NOT include lidar/IMU — those are not cameras.
failure_modes: Listing RTX LIDAR / IMU as cameras — wrong schema
Skipping the 0x0 resolution flag — Dimitri deploys a broken cam
'RealSense D435?' question answered by name-guessing instead of inspect
No grouping by parent — duplicates on same robot missed
